content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic Daily Update (Apr 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 24, 2026, focused on stabilizing the CI/CD pipeline for standalone publishing and correcting model configuration errors. Key updates include aligning npm workflows with TypeScript package requirements and fixing a malformed Haiku model ID to ensure proper integration.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### CI/CD Pipeline and Publishing Improvements
*   Aligned npm workflows and the TypeScript package to support standalone publishing ([#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/19)).
*   Updated CI to gate releases on `typescript/package.json` and execute `bun publish` from the `typescript/` directory ([#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/19)).
*   Replaced `@elizaos/core` workspace references with published versions to ensure `bun install` compatibility in CI ([#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/19)).
*   Externalized `jsonrepair` for browser Bun compatibility ([#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/19)).

### Model Configuration Fixes
*   Corrected a malformed Haiku model ID in `DEFAULT_SMALL_MODEL` and `package.json` ([#20](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/20)).
*   Removed the duplicated suffix "5-20251001" from the model string, updating it to "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001" ([#20](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/20)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None
